problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to low, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
